summary: Made two surgical seam edits: shifted the opening to a distinct cistern-based entry construction and added a final sleeping-quarters breath cue to hand off more cleanly into Chapter 11.
edits: Reframed the first sentence around Jin at the cistern instead of a 'When Fasa rang...' opening while preserving the same narrative information and tone.
Extended the last sentence with a subtle caught-breath detail so the chapter exits closer to Chapter 11's nighttime focus on sleep and breathing.
